rag_rules: Use `assign` only for implementation-level bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes, and assignments in component implementation annexes
For output dependency contracts, write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs, avoiding implementation-only subcomponent paths
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index for all identifiers
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax correctly inside annex agree blocks
For input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees, use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names
For signal flow requirements, use `assign` to bind outputs to inputs through connections
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
